stories.title: Decision Update — v2 in hermes-and-memex-study.md
stories.evidence: Commit 381aa1c; grep 'Decision Update — v2' hermes-and-memex-study.md = 1; 6 borrow/diverge entries with source-line anchors.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/research/hermes-and-memex-study.md contains a 'Decision Update — v2' section
Section has 6 borrow/diverge entries (TS substrate, web panel, npm distribution, feedback hooks, build-time vendor, staging-tier auto-promotion)

stories.title: learner-deep-study.md cited as design north star
stories.evidence: Commit 381aa1c; Decision Update v2 cites learner-deep-study.md and explicitly maps 5 superiority dims to AC8–AC12.
acceptanceCriteria: Decision Update — v2 references docs/research/learner-deep-study.md as design north star
5 superiority dimensions explicitly mapped to AC8–AC12 (append-and-revise, feedback flywheel, two-tier promotion, semantic similarity, tool-trace-aware extraction)

stories.title: Research/spec commits land before any src/dist/.claude-plugin/web file
stories.evidence: git log shows commits 4ebc952 (v1 cleanup) and 381aa1c (Decision Update v2) on main; no src/, dist/, .claude-plugin/, web/ files exist yet.
acceptanceCriteria: git log --diff-filter=A --name-only --reverse shows research/spec commits before any src/, dist/, .claude-plugin/, or web/ file

stories.title: package.json declares @yao/skila with bin/engines/version + esbuild+tailwindcss devDeps
stories.evidence: Commit 2ca0bef. package.json has name=@yao/skila v0.1.0, bin.skila=dist/cli.js, engines.node>=20, type=module, files=[dist,.claude-plugin,smithery.yaml,README.md,LICENSE]. devDependencies: typescript, @types/node, esbuild, tailwindcss, @codemirror/{state,view,lang-markdown}, marked. Runtime dependencies: only gray-matter.
acceptanceCriteria: devDependencies includes esbuild and tailwindcss (NOT in runtime dependencies)

stories.title: .claude-plugin/plugin.json declares /skila + PostToolUse + Stop hooks
stories.evidence: Commit 2ca0bef. plugin.json declares /skila slash, PostToolUse + Stop hooks both → ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/hooks/feedback.cjs (relative-resolved, survives npm i -g).
acceptanceCriteria: All hook paths resolve via __dirname-style shim (no absolute hardcoded paths)

stories.title: smithery.yaml declares npx -y @yao/skila mcp stdio
stories.evidence: Commit 2ca0bef. smithery.yaml: stdio transport, command `npx -y @yao/skila mcp` (memex pattern).

stories.title: npm pack --dry-run ships dist/ + .claude-plugin/ + smithery.yaml + README.md + LICENSE; vendor assets present; no CDN URLs
stories.evidence: Commit 2ca0bef. npm install (109 pkgs ok), npm run build ok (cm.js=502kb, tw.css=8kb), npm pack --dry-run lists 11 files including dist/web/vendor/{cm.js,tw.css}; grep -c 'https://' dist/web/index.html = 0; node dist/cli.js --help exit 0.
acceptanceCriteria: npm pack --dry-run lists dist/, .claude-plugin/, smithery.yaml, README.md, LICENSE

stories.title: Append-and-revise: UPDATE→X with parentVersion + non-empty changelog
stories.evidence: Commit 3806f58. tests/e2e/test_revise_path.ts green: UPDATE→azure-pipeline-debug, parentVersion=0.1.0, newVersion=0.2.0, changelog references session-2.
acceptanceCriteria: Given existing published skill X, /skila offers [UPDATE→X v0.1.0→v0.2.0] row
Accepting produces v0.2.0 with parentVersion=0.1.0 and non-empty changelog entry

stories.title: Feedback flywheel: Stop hook updates feedback.json within 1s (mocked-clock)
stories.evidence: Commit 3806f58. tests/e2e/test_feedback_loop.ts green: mtime delta ≤1000ms; burst 50 fires <100ms → queueDepth ≤10.
acceptanceCriteria: Burst test (50 PostToolUse fires within 100ms) asserts queueDepth ≤ 10

stories.title: Two-tier promotion: drafts→.draft-skila/, auto-promote→.staging-skila/, explicit graduate→published
stories.evidence: Commit 3806f58. tests/e2e/test_promotion_gate.ts green: distill→draft, auto→staging, graduate→published, reject→archived.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-promotion fires under floor (≥10 invocations OR ≥1 failure) and lands in .staging-skila/, NOT published
Explicit user graduate (web POST or CLI) moves to published

stories.title: Semantic similarity via LLM judge with three-input prompt + output shape + classification + hallucination guard
acceptanceCriteria: src/judge/prompt.ts builds prompt with 3 inputs: inventory, candidate, last-30 tool trace
tests/judge/test_judge_prompt.ts asserts all 3 inputs present in prompt
tests/judge/test_judge_output_shape.ts asserts JSON has decision, similarity, justification, suggested_version_bump
tests/judge/test_judge_hallucination_guard.ts: judge UPDATE→does-not-exist downgrades to [NEW] with structured warning

stories.title: Tool-trace-aware extraction: judge prompt cites tool sequence + e2e on 3 fixture sessions
acceptanceCriteria: Judge prompt distillation section explicitly references 'tool sequence' as input

stories.title: skila serve on 127.0.0.1:7777 with auto-increment + clean Ctrl-C
GET / returns HTML; GET /api/skills returns JSON spanning 5 statuses (draft|staging|published|archived|disabled)
acceptanceCriteria: JSON includes all 5 status buckets: draft, staging, published, archived, disabled

stories.title: Write endpoints update disk + git commit (or flat snapshot); concurrent feedback writes safe via lockfile
acceptanceCriteria: tests/web/test_api_endpoints.ts passes for both git and flat adapters
Each PUT/POST endpoint reflected on disk + git/flat history
tests/feedback/test_concurrent_writes.ts: 100 concurrent incrementUsage(name) → final usageCount=100 for every name; no lock-not-released warnings

stories.title: CodeMirror 6 editor (vendored, no CDN) loads/edits/saves via PUT; survives refresh
Rollback creates new current version, never destroys history; revisionCount++ + changelog entry
acceptanceCriteria: Rollback to v0.1.0 creates new v0.X.Y bytes-equal v0.1.0
revisionCount incremented; changelog has 'Rolled back to v0.1.0' entry

stories.title: Visual gate ≥7/10 via oh-my-claudecode:visual-verdict against Obsidian/GitHub reference
acceptanceCriteria: agent-browser captures screenshots of dashboard, skill list, skill detail, diff viewer
Sub-7 triggers designer agent rework before AC18 can close

stories.title: First-paint LCP: cold ≤500ms, warm ≤200ms on local vendor
acceptanceCriteria: Cold cache LCP ≤ 500ms (first load, no prewarming)

stories.title: Web UI surfaces staging candidates with graduate/reject; surfaces hallucination warning
acceptanceCriteria: Each staging candidate has 'graduate' and 'reject' buttons
Hallucination fallback (judge proposed UPDATE→X but X not found) surfaces as warning banner

stories.title: GitBackedStorage via child_process.execFile (no simple-git dep)
stories.evidence: Commit 285bb77. src/storage/git.ts uses execFile only; no simple-git/nodegit imports. tests/storage/test_adapter_selection.ts (git mode) green.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses child_process.execFile('git', ...) — no simple-git import anywhere in src/

stories.title: FlatFileStorage with identical interface; versions/<name>/v0.X.Y/SKILL.md layout
stories.evidence: Commit 285bb77. src/storage/flat.ts implements StorageAdapter; versions/<name>/v0.X.Y/{SKILL.md,.meta.json}. test_adapter_selection.ts (flat mode) green.
acceptanceCriteria: src/storage/flat.ts implements same interface as git.ts

stories.title: Factory selects adapter via git --version once; logs once; never re-warns; no top-level skila storage migrate
stories.evidence: Commit 285bb77. Factory module-level logged flag; double-boot test green; `node dist/cli.js storage migrate` → 'unknown command'; no-silent-switch test green via .adapter-mode sentinel.
acceptanceCriteria: Factory checks git --version at startup; selects adapter; logs selection ONCE
Double-boot produces 1 log line, no warning, no re-selection
Refuses silent switch (e.g., flat→git) via .adapter-mode sentinel
Top-level subcommand `skila storage migrate` does NOT exist (CLI returns 'unknown command')
Migration only via `skila doctor --fix-storage` with user confirmation

stories.title: All storage writes atomic via temp + fs.rename; kill -9 mid-write leaves old or new only
stories.evidence: Commit 285bb77. tests/storage/test_atomic_writes.ts: 5/5 SIGKILL trials bytes-clean; EXDEV cross-device copy+unlink fallback covered.
acceptanceCriteria: kill -9 mid-write fork test: file is bytes-equal old OR new, never partial

stories.title: Full evolution-path 10-step e2e under git × flat matrix
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/test_evolution_path.ts implements all 10 steps from plan §4.4
Steps: setup → distill→draft → promote→published → distill→draft v0.2.0 → auto-stage → graduate → feedback×3 → rollback → disable → reactivate
Each step asserts FS state + git/flat history + feedback.json state

stories.title: skila ships as real Anthropic skill package under skills/skila/
acceptanceCriteria: skills/skila/SKILL.md exists with valid frontmatter (name, description, ≤1024 chars)

stories.title: skila lint skills/skila/ returns 0 warnings (skila passes its own quality bar)
Smithery mcp mode storage isolation (ephemeral tmpdir; read-only; orphan cleanup)
stories.evidence: Commit 3806f58. tests/mcp/test_smithery_isolation.ts green: child SKILA_HOME under /tmp/skila-smithery-<pid>/; real home mtime unchanged; mutation commands disabled; orphan >1h pruned.
acceptanceCriteria: Spawning `node dist/cli.js mcp` sets SKILA_HOME to /tmp/skila-smithery-<pid>/ in child env
No fd opened on ~/.claude/skila-data/ during Smithery mode
Mutation commands (distill/promote/graduate/archive/disable/reactivate/rollback/feedback) disabled in Smithery mode
